title: End Phantoms
description: Simple datapack adding phantoms to the end.
body:
This simple datapack adds phantoms to the end. In most scenarios they have a 1/5 chance to spawn compared to enderman. This is done to add diversity, and challenge to the end dimension. Encouraging the player to interact with Enderman and use ender pearls as opposed to bridging everywhere. Some slightly more complex spawn rules also allow the player to build Phantom mob farms, bringing even more diversity and purpose to the end.

Supports all vanilla biomes. If you are using [Endercon](https://modrinth.com/datapack/endercon), support can be found [here](https://modrinth.com/project/endercon-end-phantoms/).
